description: Issue #212 adversarial planted case: same combined-hunk bypass as reject-combined-hunk-no-exos-indemnity-exempt-first, with the order reversed -- the non-exempt one-way 'Exos shall indemnify Institution' violation comes FIRST, and the exempt phrase 'hold harmless the other party' comes SECOND in the same hunk. Verifies span-level exemption is order-independent: the violation must fire regardless of where in the hunk the exempt phrase sits.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Exos shall indemnify Institution for any and all claims, damages, and losses, without limit. In addition, each party shall hold harmless the other party from ordinary third-party claims arising in the normal course of business.
planted_variation.notes: Issue #212 repro (order: violation first, exempt phrase second). Confirms the fix is order-independent -- the 'exos shall indemnify' span is not inside the 'hold harmless the other party' exempt span regardless of which sentence comes first in the hunk.

detector_expectation.rationale: Span-level exemption is order-independent: 'Exos shall indemnify Institution' is a separate, non-exempt span from 'hold harmless the other party' regardless of sentence order, and must fire no-exos-indemnity via the 'exos shall indemnif' regex trigger.
